offer: For property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual report preparation causes cash flow gaps. We automate report generation instead of manual report preparation using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual preparation of utility expense reports is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
